label: Exposure Attribution
description: Grouped exposure table with stacked time series chart. Breaks down gross and net exposure by factor.

0.5.note: MOCK_STRATEGIES imported from ./risk-data-context (re-export), not directly from lib/mocks.

0.7.note: empty filteredExposureRows renders no table rows; empty time series hides the chart section.

l0.notes: 0.1 ✓ WidgetErrorBoundary via widget-wrapper. 0.2 ✓ requiredEntitlements: [execution-basic, execution-full]. 0.3 ✓ availableOn: [risk]. 0.4 ✓ no any/ts-ignore. 0.5 ✓ MOCK_STRATEGIES imported from ./risk-data-context (re-export), not directly from lib/mocks. 0.6 FIXED — added isLoading spinner guard. 0.7 ✓ empty filteredExposureRows renders no table rows; empty time series hides the chart section. 0.8 FIXED — added hasError early-return block. 0.9 ✓ no dead code.

1.1.note: data exclusively from useRiskData() — filteredExposureRows, groupedExposure, exposureTimeSeries all from context.

1.7.note: ⚠ MOCK_STRATEGIES re-exported through context from lib/mocks/fixtures/risk-data — these strategy archetypes are reference data and should move to lib/constants/risk. The widget uses MOCK_STRATEGIES for strategy filter dropdown labels — functional but reference data location is wrong.

l1.notes: 1.1 ✓ data exclusively from useRiskData() — filteredExposureRows, groupedExposure, exposureTimeSeries all from context. 1.2 ✓ use-risk-page-data.ts calls useGlobalScope(). 1.3 ✓ scope.organizationIds feeds scopeStrategyIds → riskLimits filter. 1.4 ✓ scope.clientIds via getStrategyIdsForScope. 1.5 ✓ scope.strategyIds via getStrategyIdsForScope. 1.6 ✓ empty scope → unfiltered data. 1.7 ⚠ MOCK_STRATEGIES re-exported through context from lib/mocks/fixtures/risk-data — these strategy archetypes are reference data and should move to lib/constants/risk. The widget uses MOCK_STRATEGIES for strategy filter dropdown labels — functional but reference data location is wrong.

knownIssues: 1.7: MOCK_STRATEGIES (strategy archetype reference data) travels through lib/mocks/fixtures/risk-data → context re-export → widget. Should be in lib/constants/risk instead. Affects strategy filter dropdown labels.
findings: 0.6 fix: added isLoading spinner early-return (was missing)
0.8 fix: added hasError early-return block (was missing)
